content.content:
{
  "name": "svelte-monorepo",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "description": "monorepo for svelte and friends",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "license": "MIT",
  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.4.0",
  "engines": {
    "pnpm": ">=9.0.0"
  },
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "git+https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte.git"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "pnpm -r --filter=./packages/* build",
    "check": "cd packages/svelte && pnpm build && cd ../../ && pnpm -r check",
    "lint": "eslint && prettier --check .",
    "format": "prettier --write .",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "changeset:version": "changeset version && pnpm -r generate:version && git add --all",
    "changeset:publish": "changeset publish",
    "bench": "node --allow-natives-syntax ./benchmarking/run.js",
    "bench:compare": "node --allow-natives-syntax ./benchmarking/compare/index.js",
    "bench:debug": "node --allow-natives-syntax --inspect-brk ./benchmarking/run.js"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@changesets/cli": "^2.27.8",
    "@sveltejs/eslint-config": "^8.3.3",
    "@svitejs/changesets-changelog-github-compact": "^1.1.0",
    "@types/node": "^20.11.5",
    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^4.0.5",
    "eslint": "^9.9.1",
    "eslint-plugin-lube": "^0.4.3",
    "eslint-plugin-svelte": "^3.11.0",
    "jsdom": "25.0.1",
    "playwright": "^1.46.1",
    "prettier": "^3.2.4",
    "prettier-plugin-svelte": "^3.4.0",
    "svelte": "workspace:^",
    "typescript": "^5.5.4",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.24.0",
    "v8-natives": "^1.2.5",
    "vitest": "^4.0.5"
  }
}

input.description: Run validator tests via vitest run args
Remove temporary validator sample test case

content.text: Fixed `duplicate_class_field` false-positive when a class has both an instance and a `static` method with the same name. ### Root cause In `packages/svelte/src/compiler/phases/2-analyze/visitors/ClassBody.js`, the duplicate-tracking map (`fields`) keyed methods only by their name, so `hello()` and `static hello()` collided. ### Fix When recording `MethodDefinition`s, the key now includes a `static:` prefix for static methods, so instance/static namespaces don’t conflict. ### Validation - Added a temporary validator sample that reproduced the error with: ```js export class Hello { hello() {} static hello() {} } ``` It failed before the change and passed after. - Re-ran `packages/svelte/tests/validator/test.ts` successfully after removing the temporary test sample. No commits made, and the temporary test case was deleted as requested.

trajectory.result: Fixed `duplicate_class_field` false-positive when a class has both an instance and a `static` method with the same name. ### Root cause In `packages/svelte/src/compiler/phases/2-analyze/visitors/ClassBody.js`, the duplicate-tracking map (`fields`) keyed methods only by their name, so `hello()` and `static hello()` collided. ### Fix When recording `MethodDefinition`s, the key now includes a `static:` prefix for static methods, so instance/static namespaces don’t conflict. ### Validation - Added a temporary validator sample that reproduced the error with: ```js export class Hello { hello() {} static hello() {} } ``` It failed before the change and passed after. - Re-ran `packages/svelte/tests/validator/test.ts` successfully after removing the temporary test sample. No commits made, and the temporary test case was deleted as requested.
